title: New footage in directors cut NOT in Death and Rebirth
display_title: New footage in directors cut NOT in Death and Rebirth
wikitext:
[]: New footage in director's cut NOT in Death and Rebirth             Quote Post by Number 44 » Sat May 01, 2010 9:51 pm Just watched Death and Rebirth. I had read many places that the all new footage in the directors cut episodes were simply shot for Death and Rebirth, and added to the Series. This is incorrect?! Just causally watching, Rei's Death is not altered for Death and Rebirth like it is in director's cut. Asuka's break down over bath water, wasn't either was it? Heck did any of the new Kaworu footage make it into Death? Anyways, sure this has been addressed in another thread. Anyone got a link to the topic please?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat May 01, 2010 10:06 pm There were 3 versions of Death, 2 in theaters and 1 on home video. The 2nd one had a lot of the extra footage removed to promote the sales of the TV series release, some of the new scenes were added back in on the home video release (Death True^2). There were some scenes that were reanimated (like Rei in the entry plug after Ramiel's fight). Aside from the practice room scenes, the only one unique to Death is probably Kaworu's image in the reflection of Rei's eyes when she was choked by Naoko.

[]:             Quote Post by Number 44 » Sat May 01, 2010 10:23 pm Ornette wrote: There were 3 versions of Death, 2 in theaters and 1 on home video. The 2nd one had a lot of the extra footage removed to promote the sales of the TV series release, some of the new scenes were added back in on the home video release (Death True^2). There were some scenes that were reanimated (like Rei in the entry plug after Ramiel's fight). Aside from the practice room scenes, the only one unique to Death is probably Kaworu's image in the reflection of Rei's eyes when she was choked by Naoko.

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Sat May 01, 2010 11:47 pm Number 44 wrote: Specifically, I'm referring to EVA-00 turning into Giant Naked Rei ™ just prior to self destruction. My DVD has the old death scene. Was there a version of Death and Rebirth with the new cut of the EVA-00 self destruct?
